pi_items.source: Verified from task.json, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh consistency; valid file path in home directory structure
Task description explicitly states: 'You are a curriculum coordinator at Riverdale Elementary School'
Official GCompris documentation (https://gcompris.net/docbook/stable6/en/user-interface.html) states: 'For math activities, we have three subcategories: numeration, arithmetic and measures'
Confirmed in task.json metadata field, README.md (line 24), and verifier.py (line 76); consistent across all files

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a formal curriculum audit report for GCompris math section at /home/ga/Desktop/math_curriculum_audit.txt. GCompris is a real, open-source educational software with over 190 activities, installed via Ubuntu repository package gcompris-qt. The math section contains exactly three verified subcategories: Numeration, Arithmetic, and Measures. The report must be at least 400 bytes and include labeled sections for all three math subcategories. The task is designed for a curriculum coordinator role at an elementary school district.
